title: Patch (disambiguation)
content:
'''Patch''' could mean:
*[[Patch Bruit]], the chief of field operations for [[Lommite Limited]]
*[[Patch]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]
*[[Diagnostics Systems Diverter]], also known as the "Patch", a computer diagnostics tool
*[[Patch-4]], a refuse [[Planet/Legends|planet]]
*The [[Old Patch]], a part of [[Abregado-rae Spaceport]]
*[[Droid patch-in unit]], counterparts to [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|moisture vaporators]]
*[[SuriTech Disposable Toximeter Patch]], a form of [[tox detector]]
*[[Eye patch/Legends|Eye patch]]
*[[Zekka Thyne]], otherwise known as "Patches," a criminal.
*[[57|57 "Patch"]] (clone trooper)
{{Disambig}}
